# My Path Agent

Well versed with Quake 2 engine and related forks, knows all its ins-and-outs of each subsystem but mostly about the clipping/collision model and the correlation of that to the BSP format itself.
Also studied thoroughly the following few pages and is a master at data structures for efficiently creating and serializing a variety of sorts of navigation meshes produced by BSP data.
https://www.redblobgames.com/pathfinding/tower-defense/#diagram-parents
https://www.redblobgames.com/pathfinding/distance-to-any/
https://theory.stanford.edu/~amitp/GameProgramming/
